TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Kay-luo, title = Kay-luo, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kay-luo} }

S.FORM: == Kay-luo ÈñãÁæÖ == Kay-luo "A-la-puo kamu :ÿßŸÑŸÇÿßŸáÿ±ÿ©‚Äé,Luo-ma-hua:al-QƒÅhirah,IPA:(√¶l'q…ëÀêh…™…æ…ë) )u Ay-ci a suo-tu, Ay-ci satabakiay a tukay atu kanatal sakaudip, saculilan atu tatelungan a lalangaw, inatukay milakuuyt tu Ni-luo-he, u niyadu' nu Cung-tung a cen-ce, sakaudip atu tatelingan nu pisiwbayan. u Kay-luo-sen, Ci-lung-sen atu Kay-le-yiw-pu-sen misakaputay, saan u Ta-kay-luo niyadu', tuseptucay mihcaan, ina niyaduan tademaw makaala tu tucaylusep a wang ku tademaw, ina Ta-kay-lu mala Ay-ci atu A-la-puo kitakit atu Huy-cuo satabakiay a tukayan, u kitakit nu sabaw enem nu tabakiay a tukayan. ÈñãÁæÖ(ÈòøÊãâ‰ºØË™û:ÿßŸÑŸÇÿßŸáÿ±ÿ©‚Äé,ÁæÖÈ¶¨Âåñ:al-QƒÅhirah,IPA:(√¶l'q…ëÀêh…™…æ…ë) ) . Kay-luo i kitakit u satenensay a tukayan, namaka Ku-ay-ci nu zitayan a Mun-huy-se namaka babalakiay a kitidaan atu Ci-sa-cin-ce-ta-cun, taydaaca i tukay namaka Ay-ci-a-la-puo nikudan a sayaway nu suo-tu Hu-se-ta-te' nipalahatan, aydaay a Kay-luo niyadu', A-la-puo-mu-se-lin ku katuuday, Ke-pu-te' sinzya nu kikisetu katuud ku tademawan. . Kay-luo a tatelungan nu likisi itida i caysiwpicsiw mihcaan mapasiket tu kitakit u liwan namaka babalakiay. miduduc tu hekal atu kitakit nu pikinkiwan a wangle " GaWC" a nipihapu " kitakit nu tukayan" a kasi nganganan, Kay-luo pasilacen u BETA+ ci a kanatal tukay katukuh ayda, Kay-luo idaw ku A-la-puo satenesay nu kitakit a likisian, satabakiay a lalangawan, kakacuduan atu dadadiwan nu kawawan, atu sakatusa nu kitakitan nu sumamaday a satalakaway nu Ay-ce-ha-e tabakiay a cacudadan. hatidaay nu pasingbungay, kakakulian atu masakaputay itini tina niyadu'an idaw namin ku nipatideng tu hunbuan, A-la-puo kanatal lin-mun a sin-ce tatelunga itinitu a patideng. (GaWC) BETA . ayda Kay-luo tademaw malakuuyt ku 1000 wang ku tademaw, tukay nu kitidaan milakuuyt tu 453 pin-hun-kun-li, duma hakiya idaw ku 950 a tademawan i capi nu tukay mueneng. malecad atu duma a tukayan, Kay-luo laecus tu hahanhanan atu caculilan hinasud tu. Kay-luo sasaay nu silamalay u Huy-cu tusa ku dadan nu sasaay a silamalay, caay kaw kitikit nu sakanai'an nu lawat a sabaw lima nu sasaay a silamalay, tu mihcaan mikacaway a tademaw makaala tu 10 yi a tatademawan. 2005 mihcaan Kay-luo sakaudip itida i Cung-tung u sayaway, 2010 mihcaan hekalay nu tukay nipiasipan i kitakit saka 43 ku nika singanganan. 43‰Ωç. likisi Ê≠∑Âè≤ Kay-luo itida i Ay-ci sa u Yiw-nu " Ku-ay-ci kamu : ·ªâwnw,La-tin-hua:lunu,imi u " kakaydaan" aci An-nu "Anu", bacalay a cudad u Oan "On",He-li-aw-puo-li-se " Si-la kamu: HŒªŒπŒøœçœÄŒøŒªŒπœÇ, imi u " di'tu nu cilal a tukay", Mi-se-e : A-la-puo kamu : ‚Äéduma han "Mi·π£r", imi u "luma' nu hitay, nikuda mala haminay nu Ay-ci a ngangan", nikudan sumad han u Hu-se-ta-te' " A-la-puo kamu: ‚Äé ÿßŸÑŸÅÿ≥ÿ∑ÿßÿ∑‚Äé,,imi u " timaku" 868 mihcaan Tu-lun-wan-caw Ay-mi-e-ay-ha-may-de.Yi-pen. Tu-lun itida i Hu-se-ta-te' amisan misangan tu baluhay tu Cya-ta-yi "A-la-puo kamu:ÿßŸÑŸÇÿ∑ÿßÿ¶ŸÄÿπ‚Äé, katukuh 999 mihcaan Fa-ti-ma-wan-caw Ha-li-hua Mu-yi-ce-pay-pu hiya ku Caw-hay-e debungan ku A-pa-se wan-caw kuwanan a Ay-ci, 973 mihcaan malimad tayni i tini, ya baluhay a suotu pala Kay-lou "al-QƒÅhira, imi kata a tukay" kalingatuaan a ngangan. :·ªâwnw,Êãâ‰∏ÅÂåñ:lunu,ÊÑèÁÇ∫"ÈÄöÈÅì")ÊàñÂÆâÂä™(Anu), (al-QƒÅhira, . kitidaan Âú∞ÁêÜ Ka-luo itida i Ay-ci amisan, tumulan nu Ti-cun-hay 165 kun-li, Su-yi-se-wan atu Su-yi-se-sauwac nutipan tu 120 kun-li. ina tukay itida i Ni-luo-he dadipasan, mitepal tu nanum miliyas tu liken a dihepan, macinuwas taydan i sasa nu Ni-lu-he San-cyaw-cuo a timulan. Amica ku Kay-luo namaka Ni-luo-he pasayda minayat tu ahebalay, nika Kay-luo-se itida i sauwac nu walian nu dadipasan atu nu tusaay a subala, hamin nu kitidaan 453 pin-fun-kun-li. . katukuh tu 19 se-ci cun-ye, nanum mala cascas, sapiteng tu nanum atu duma nu sapilawa, icapi nu Kay-lu a Ni-luo-he hina kaydaan nu nanum atu talakw sananay a nanum. hatiniay tu nu mihcaan, Ni-luo-he hamaw sa pasayda i nutipan, patideng tu walian nu lilisan atu aydaay nu maci a Muo-ka-ta-mu nika talakawan a kakitidaan. sabaw tu cacay a secian Ni-luo-he a salahbal matulin macunus ku Kay-luo a niyadu'. idaw ku cacayay u Geziret al-Fil a baluhay nu subalan itida i 1174 mihcaan sayaway a tahekal, nika sadikuday atu Ta-lu malalitin. Geziret al-Fi a liwan namaka babalakiay nu kitidaan ayda han u Su-pu-la niyaduan. kainai'an nu lahecian a zitay itida i sabaw sepat a secian patideng tu duma a subalan, ayda u Ca-ma-lei-ke' kitidaan atu Cea-ci-la-kitidaan a nisakaputan. Ma-mu-lu-ke tademaw atu E'-tu-man tademaw a misatadas tu lala, misaicelang patideng tu tukay atu nanum itida i walian a misaahebal. Áõ¥Âà∞19 Geziret al-Fil .Geziret al-Fil . mulaliway tu nu nanum i Ni-luo-he, tukay a sin-sin-niyaduan, pasu balubaluan a tukay, telungan nu Kay-luo atu Ca-ma-lea-ke patideng sa i miliyas tu dadipasan nu macapiay a kitidaan. ya kitidaan u Kay-luo nu Ta-se-kun a kitidaan, i amis, wali atu timul hiyan nu tukay a lawaan ku malumanay a niyadu'an. malumanay a Kya-luo i tumulan nu macimacian, idaw ku Hu-se-ta-te' a liwan nu babalaki atu Kay-lu-ke-pu-te' sumamaday a tukay. i amisan nu tukay a Pu'-la-ke' niyadu' i sabaw tu enem a idaw nu cacayay a minatuan, aydaay nu Kay-luo tatelungan nu kakulian. Kay-luo-cen-paw itida i walian nu macimacian. miliwliw tu Kay-luo Yi-se-lan malumanay, Kay-luo nu tipan idaw ku ahebalay a kilakilangan nu dadanan, itidaay a niyadu'an malalid nu O-cuo aydaay a sangan nu luma'an, walian nu pinaay a se-cian kacikian sa nai' ku mamamelawan, adidiay a dada, macacecelay nu matatuntunduhay a luamaan atu Yi-se-lan a sangan nu luma' ku tatungusan. . amisan nu Kay-luo atu sawalian pasu Wi-sin tukay nu niyadu'an, u aydaay nu macunusay a tukay nu niyadu'an, hakiya i 20 se-ci tu hedek atu 21 se-ci lingatu mabuwah tawya, mananam tu Kay-luo a nikacelakan. Ni-luo-he nutipan maala ku Kay-luo macimacian, nika namaka Ci-lun-se atu Ci-lung-sen nikakaputan. aydaay nina tukay amica kaw nu Kay-lauo a niyadu'an u tademaw makaala tu 270 wang nu tademawan. tusepsepwal mihcaan Kay-lou-sen itida i He-le-wang amisan, tawya Ka-luo timulan nu niyadu'an, pasu Ma-ti atu Sin-kay-lu, pakakenisa pala baluhay a sen, katukuh i tusepcaycay mihcaan, He-le-wang-sen malangatu aca papidipicen i Kay-luo-sen. .
S.PHON: == kaj-r~…æuo ** == kaj-r~…æuo "a-r~…æa-puo kamu :********,r~…æuo-ma-ƒßua:ar~…æ-**ƒßiraƒß,ipa:(*r~…æ î~ °***ƒß*…æ*) )u aj- ¶i a suo-tu, aj- ¶i satabakiaj a tukaj atu kanatar~…æ sakaudip, sa ¶ur~…æir~…æan atu tat…ôr~…æu≈ãan a r~…æar~…æa≈ãaw, inatukaj mir~…æakuujt tu ni-r~…æuo-ƒß…ô, u nijadu î~ ° nu ¶u≈ã-tu≈ã a ¶…ôn- ¶…ô, sakaudip atu tat…ôr~…æi≈ãan nu pisiwbajan. u kaj-r~…æuo-s…ôn, ¶i-r~…æu≈ã-s…ôn atu kaj-r~…æ…ô-jiw-pu-s…ôn misakaputaj, saan u ta-kaj-r~…æuo nijadu î~ °, tus…ôptu ¶aj miƒß ¶aan, ina nijaduan tad…ômaw makaar~…æa tu tu ¶ajr~…æus…ôp a wa≈ã ku tad…ômaw, ina ta-kaj-r~…æu mar~…æa aj- ¶i atu a-r~…æa-puo kitakit atu ƒßuj- ¶uo satabakiaj a tukajan, u kitakit nu sabaw …ôn…ôm nu tabakiaj a tukajan. **(****:********,***:ar~…æ-**ƒßiraƒß,ipa:(*r~…æ î~ °***ƒß*…æ*) ) . kaj-r~…æuo i kitakit u sat…ôn…ônsaj a tukajan, namaka ku-aj- ¶i nu zitajan a mun-ƒßuj-s…ô namaka babar~…æakiaj a kitidaan atu ¶i-sa- ¶in- ¶…ô-ta- ¶un, tajdaa ¶a i tukaj namaka aj- ¶i-a-r~…æa-puo nikudan a sajawaj nu suo-tu ƒßu-s…ô-ta-t…ô î~ ° nipar~…æaƒßatan, ajdaaj a kaj-r~…æuo nijadu î~ °, a-r~…æa-puo-mu-s…ô-r~…æin ku katuudaj, k…ô-pu-t…ô î~ ° sinzja nu kikis…ôtu katuud ku tad…ômawan. . kaj-r~…æuo a tat…ôr~…æu≈ãan nu r~…æikisi itida i ¶ajsiwpi ¶siw miƒß ¶aan mapasik…ôt tu kitakit u r~…æiwan namaka babar~…æakiaj. midudu ¶ tu ƒß…ôkar~…æ atu kitakit nu pikinkiwan a wa≈ãr~…æ…ô " gaw ¶" a nipiƒßapu " kitakit nu tukajan" a kasi ≈ãa≈ãanan, kaj-r~…æuo pasir~…æa ¶…ôn u b…ôta+ ¶i a kanatar~…æ tukaj katukuƒß ajda, kaj-r~…æuo idaw ku a-r~…æa-puo sat…ôn…ôsaj nu kitakit a r~…æikisian, satabakiaj a r~…æar~…æa≈ãawan, kaka ¶uduan atu dadadiwan nu kawawan, atu sakatusa nu kitakitan nu sumamadaj a satar~…æakawaj nu aj- ¶…ô-ƒßa-…ô tabakiaj a ¶a ¶udadan. ƒßatidaaj nu pasi≈ãbu≈ãaj, kakakur~…æian atu masakaputaj itini tina nijadu î~ °an idaw namin ku nipatid…ô≈ã tu ƒßunbuan, a-r~…æa-puo kanatar~…æ r~…æin-mun a sin- ¶…ô tat…ôr~…æu≈ãa itinitu a patid…ô≈ã. (gaw ¶) b…ôta . ajda kaj-r~…æuo tad…ômaw mar~…æakuujt ku **** wa≈ã ku tad…ômaw, tukaj nu kitidaan mir~…æakuujt tu *** pin-ƒßun-kun-r~…æi, duma ƒßakija idaw ku *** a tad…ômawan i ¶api nu tukaj mu…ôn…ô≈ã. mar~…æ…ô ¶ad atu duma a tukajan, kaj-r~…æuo r~…æa…ô ¶us tu ƒßaƒßanƒßanan atu ¶a ¶ur~…æir~…æan ƒßinasud tu. kaj-r~…æuo sasaaj nu sir~…æamar~…æaj u ƒßuj- ¶u tusa ku dadan nu sasaaj a kamu:*********, katukuƒß *** miƒß ¶aan fa-ti-ma-wan- ¶aw ƒßa-r~…æi-ƒßua mu-ji- ¶…ô-paj-pu ƒßija ku ¶aw-ƒßaj-…ô d…ôbu≈ãan ku a-pa-s…ô wan- ¶aw kuwanan a aj- ¶i, *** miƒß ¶aan mar~…æimad tajni i tini, ja bar~…æuƒßaj a suotu par~…æa kaj-r~…æou "ar~…æ-**ƒßira, imi kata a tukaj" kar~…æi≈ãatuaan a ≈ãa≈ãan. :*wnw,***:r~…æunu,**"**")***(anu), (ar~…æ-**ƒßira, . kitidaan ** ka-r~…æuo itida i aj- ¶i amisan, diƒß…ôpan, ma ¶inuwas tajdan i sasa nu ni-r~…æu-ƒß…ô san- ¶jaw- ¶uo a timur~…æan. ami ¶a ku kaj-r~…æuo namaka ni-r~…æuo-ƒß…ô pasajda minajat tu aƒß…ôbar~…æaj, nika kaj-r~…æuo-s…ô itida i sauwa ¶ nu war~…æian nu dadipasan atu nu tusaaj a subar~…æa, ƒßamin nu kitidaan *** pin-fun-kun-r~…æi. . katukuƒß tu ** s…ô- ¶i ¶un-j…ô, nanum mar~…æa ¶as ¶as, sapit…ô≈ã tu nanum atu duma nu sapir~…æawa, i ¶api nu kaj-r~…æu a ni-r~…æuo-ƒß…ô ƒßina kajdaan nu nanum atu tar~…æakw sananaj a nanum. ƒßatiniaj tu nu miƒß ¶aan, ni-r~…æuo-ƒß…ô ƒßamaw sa pasajda i nutipan, patid…ô≈ã tu war~…æian nu r~…æir~…æisan atu ajdaaj nu ma ¶i a muo-ka-ta-mu nika tar~…æakawan a kakitidaan. sabaw tu ¶a ¶aj a s…ô ¶ian ni-r~…æuo-ƒß…ô a sar~…æaƒßbar~…æ matur~…æin ma ¶unus ku kaj-r~…æuo a nijadu î~ °. idaw ku ¶a ¶ajaj u g…ôzir…ôt ƒßan u su-pu-r~…æa nijaduan. kainai î~ °an nu r~…æaƒß…ô ¶ian a zitaj itida i sabaw s…ôpat a s…ô ¶ian patid…ô≈ã tu duma a subar~…æan, ajda u ¶a-ma-r~…æ…ôi-k…ô î~ ° kitidaan atu ¶…ôa- ¶i-r~…æa-kitidaan a nisakaputan. ma-mu-r~…æu-k…ô tad…ômaw atu …ô î~ °-tu-man tad…ômaw a misatadas tu r~…æar~…æa, misai ¶…ôr~…æa≈ã patid…ô≈ã tu tukaj atu nanum itida i war~…æian a misaaƒß…ôbar~…æ. **** g…ôzir…ôt ar~…æ-fir~…æ .g…ôzir…ôt ar~…æ-fir~…æ . mur~…æar~…æiwaj tu nu nanum i ni-r~…æuo-ƒß…ô, tukaj a sin-sin-nijaduan, pasu bar~…æubar~…æuan a tukaj, t…ôr~…æu≈ãan nu kaj-r~…æuo atu ¶a-ma-r~…æ…ôa-k…ô patid…ô≈ã sa i mir~…æijas tu dadipasan nu ma ¶apiaj a kitidaan. ja kitidaan u kaj-r~…æuo nu ta-s…ô-kun a kitidaan, i amis, war~…æi atu timur~…æ ƒßijan nu tukaj a r~…æawaan ku mar~…æumanaj a nijadu î~ °an. mar~…æumanaj a kja-r~…æuo i tumur~…æan nu ma ¶ima ¶ian, idaw ku ƒßu-s…ô-ta-t…ô î~ ° a r~…æiwan nu babar~…æaki atu kaj-r~…æu-k…ô-pu-t…ô î~ ° sumamadaj a tukaj. i amisan nu tukaj a pu î~ °-r~…æa-k…ô î~ ° nijadu î~ ° i sabaw tu …ôn…ôm a idaw nu ¶a ¶ajaj a minatuan, ajdaaj nu kaj-r~…æuo tat…ôr~…æu≈ãan nu kakur~…æian. kaj-r~…æuo- ¶…ôn-paw itida i war~…æian nu ma ¶ima ¶ian. mir~…æiwr~…æiw tu kaj-r~…æuo ji-s…ô-r~…æan mar~…æumanaj, kaj-r~…æuo nu tipan idaw ku aƒß…ôbar~…æaj a kir~…æakir~…æa≈ãan nu dadanan, itidaaj a nijadu î~ °an mar~…æar~…æid nu o- ¶uo ajdaaj a sa≈ãan nu r~…æuma î~ °an, war~…æian nu pinaaj a s…ô- ¶ian ka ¶ikian sa nai î~ ° ku mamam…ôr~…æawan, adidiaj a dada, ma ¶a ¶…ô ¶…ôr~…æaj nu matatuntunduƒßaj a r~…æuamaan atu ji-s…ô-r~…æan a sa≈ãan nu r~…æuma î~ ° ku tatu≈ãusan. . amisan nu kaj-r~…æuo atu sawar~…æian pasu wi-sin tukaj nu nijadu î~ °an, u ajdaaj nu ma ¶unusaj a tukaj nu nijadu î~ °an, ƒßakija i ** s…ô- ¶i tu ƒß…ôd…ôk atu ** s…ô- ¶i r~…æi≈ãatu mabuwaƒß tawja, mananam tu kaj-r~…æuo a nika ¶…ôr~…æakan. ni-r~…æuo-ƒß…ô nutipan maar~…æa ku kaj-r~…æuo ma ¶ima ¶ian, nika namaka ¶i-r~…æun-s…ô atu ¶i-r~…æu≈ã-s…ôn nikakaputan. ajdaaj nina tukaj ami ¶a kaw nu kaj-r~…æauo a nijadu î~ °an u tad…ômaw makaar~…æa tu *** wa≈ã nu tad…ômawan. tus…ôps…ôpwar~…æ miƒß ¶aan kaj-r~…æou-s…ôn itida i ƒß…ô-r~…æ…ô-wa≈ã amisan, tawja ka-r~…æuo timur~…æan nu nijadu î~ °an, pasu ma-ti atu sin-kaj-r~…æu, pakak…ônisa par~…æa bar~…æuƒßaj a s…ôn, katukuƒß i tus…ôp ¶aj ¶aj miƒß ¶aan, ƒß…ô-r~…æ…ô-wa≈ã-s…ôn mar~…æa≈ãatu a ¶a papidipi ¶…ôn i kaj-r~…æuo-s…ôn. .
S.FORM: == Kay-luo ÈñãÁæÖ == Kay-luo "A-la-puo kamu :ÿßŸÑŸÇÿßŸáÿ±ÿ©‚Äé,Luo-ma-hua:al-QƒÅhirah,IPA:(√¶l'q…ëÀêh…™…æ…ë) )u Ay-ci a suo-tu, Ay-ci satabakiay a tukay atu kanatal sakaudip, saculilan atu tatelungan a lalangaw, inatukay milakuuyt tu Ni-luo-he, u niyadu' nu Cung-tung a cen-ce, sakaudip atu tatelingan nu pisiwbayan. u Kay-luo-sen, Ci-lung-sen atu Kay-le-yiw-pu-sen misakaputay, saan u Ta-kay-luo niyadu', tuseptucay mihcaan, ina niyaduan tademaw makaala tu tucaylusep a wang ku tademaw, ina Ta-kay-lu mala Ay-ci atu A-la-puo kitakit atu Huy-cuo satabakiay a tukayan, u kitakit nu sabaw enem nu tabakiay a tukayan. ÈñãÁæÖ(ÈòøÊãâ‰ºØË™û:ÿßŸÑŸÇÿßŸáÿ±ÿ©‚Äé,ÁæÖÈ¶¨Âåñ:al-QƒÅhirah,IPA:(√¶l'q…ëÀêh…™…æ…ë) ) . Kay-luo i kitakit u satenensay a tukayan, namaka Ku-ay-ci nu zitayan a Mun-huy-se namaka babalakiay a kitidaan atu Ci-sa-cin-ce-ta-cun, taydaaca i tukay namaka Ay-ci-a-la-puo nikudan a sayaway nu suo-tu Hu-se-ta-te' nipalahatan, aydaay a Kay-luo niyadu', A-la-puo-mu-se-lin ku katuuday, Ke-pu-te' sinzya nu kikisetu katuud ku tademawan. . Kay-luo a tatelungan nu likisi itida i caysiwpicsiw mihcaan mapasiket tu kitakit u liwan namaka babalakiay. miduduc tu hekal atu kitakit nu pikinkiwan a wangle " GaWC" a nipihapu " kitakit nu tukayan" a kasi nganganan, Kay-luo pasilacen u BETA+ ci a kanatal tukay katukuh ayda, Kay-luo idaw ku A-la-puo satenesay nu kitakit a likisian, satabakiay a lalangawan, kakacuduan atu dadadiwan nu kawawan, atu sakatusa nu kitakitan nu sumamaday a satalakaway nu Ay-ce-ha-e tabakiay a cacudadan. hatidaay nu pasingbungay, kakakulian atu masakaputay itini tina niyadu'an idaw namin ku nipatideng tu hunbuan, A-la-puo kanatal lin-mun a sin-ce tatelunga itinitu a patideng. (GaWC) BETA . ayda Kay-luo tademaw malakuuyt ku 1000 wang ku tademaw, tukay nu kitidaan milakuuyt tu 453 pin-hun-kun-li, duma hakiya idaw ku 950 a tademawan i capi nu tukay mueneng. malecad atu duma a tukayan, Kay-luo laecus tu hahanhanan atu caculilan hinasud tu. Kay-luo sasaay nu silamalay u Huy-cu tusa ku dadan nu sasaay a silamalay, caay kaw kitikit nu sakanai'an nu lawat a sabaw lima nu sasaay a silamalay, tu mihcaan mikacaway a tademaw makaala tu 10 yi a tatademawan. 2005 mihcaan Kay-luo sakaudip itida i Cung-tung u sayaway, 2010 mihcaan hekalay nu tukay nipiasipan i kitakit saka 43 ku nika singanganan. 43‰Ωç. likisi Ê≠∑Âè≤ Kay-luo itida i Ay-ci sa u Yiw-nu " Ku-ay-ci kamu : ·ªâwnw,La-tin-hua:lunu,imi u " kakaydaan" aci An-nu "Anu", bacalay a cudad u Oan "On",He-li-aw-puo-li-se " Si-la kamu: HŒªŒπŒøœçœÄŒøŒªŒπœÇ, imi u " di'tu nu cilal a tukay", Mi-se-e : A-la-puo kamu : ‚Äéduma han "Mi·π£r", imi u "luma' nu hitay, nikuda mala haminay nu Ay-ci a ngangan", nikudan sumad han u Hu-se-ta-te' " A-la-puo kamu: ‚Äé ÿßŸÑŸÅÿ≥ÿ∑ÿßÿ∑‚Äé,,imi u " timaku" 868 mihcaan Tu-lun-wan-caw Ay-mi-e-ay-ha-may-de.Yi-pen. Tu-lun itida i Hu-se-ta-te' amisan misangan tu baluhay tu Cya-ta-yi "A-la-puo kamu:ÿßŸÑŸÇÿ∑ÿßÿ¶ŸÄÿπ‚Äé, katukuh 999 mihcaan Fa-ti-ma-wan-caw Ha-li-hua Mu-yi-ce-pay-pu hiya ku Caw-hay-e debungan ku A-pa-se wan-caw kuwanan a Ay-ci, 973 mihcaan malimad tayni i tini, ya baluhay a suotu pala Kay-lou "al-QƒÅhira, imi kata a tukay" kalingatuaan a ngangan. :·ªâwnw,Êãâ‰∏ÅÂåñ:lunu,ÊÑèÁÇ∫"ÈÄöÈÅì")ÊàñÂÆâÂä™(Anu), (al-QƒÅhira, . kitidaan Âú∞ÁêÜ Ka-luo itida i Ay-ci amisan, tumulan nu Ti-cun-hay 165 kun-li, Su-yi-se-wan atu Su-yi-se-sauwac nutipan tu 120 kun-li. ina tukay itida i Ni-luo-he dadipasan, mitepal tu nanum miliyas tu liken a dihepan, macinuwas taydan i sasa nu Ni-lu-he San-cyaw-cuo a timulan. Amica ku Kay-luo namaka Ni-luo-he pasayda minayat tu ahebalay, nika Kay-luo-se itida i sauwac nu walian nu dadipasan atu nu tusaay a subala, hamin nu kitidaan 453 pin-fun-kun-li. . katukuh tu 19 se-ci cun-ye, nanum mala cascas, sapiteng tu nanum atu duma nu sapilawa, icapi nu Kay-lu a Ni-luo-he hina kaydaan nu nanum atu talakw sananay a nanum. hatiniay tu nu mihcaan, Ni-luo-he hamaw sa pasayda i nutipan, patideng tu walian nu lilisan atu aydaay nu maci a Muo-ka-ta-mu nika talakawan a kakitidaan. sabaw tu cacay a secian Ni-luo-he a salahbal matulin macunus ku Kay-luo a niyadu'. idaw ku cacayay u Geziret al-Fil a baluhay nu subalan itida i 1174 mihcaan sayaway a tahekal, nika sadikuday atu Ta-lu malalitin. Geziret al-Fi a liwan namaka babalakiay nu kitidaan ayda han u Su-pu-la niyaduan. kainai'an nu lahecian a zitay itida i sabaw sepat a secian patideng tu duma a subalan, ayda u Ca-ma-lei-ke' kitidaan atu Cea-ci-la-kitidaan a nisakaputan. Ma-mu-lu-ke tademaw atu E'-tu-man tademaw a misatadas tu lala, misaicelang patideng tu tukay atu nanum itida i walian a misaahebal. Áõ¥Âà∞19 Geziret al-Fil .Geziret al-Fil . mulaliway tu nu nanum i Ni-luo-he, tukay a sin-sin-niyaduan, pasu balubaluan a tukay, telungan nu Kay-luo atu Ca-ma-lea-ke patideng sa i miliyas tu dadipasan nu macapiay a kitidaan. ya kitidaan u Kay-luo nu Ta-se-kun a kitidaan, i amis, wali atu timul hiyan nu tukay a lawaan ku malumanay a niyadu'an. malumanay a Kya-luo i tumulan nu macimacian, idaw ku Hu-se-ta-te' a liwan nu babalaki atu Kay-lu-ke-pu-te' sumamaday a tukay. i amisan nu tukay a Pu'-la-ke' niyadu' i sabaw tu enem a idaw nu cacayay a minatuan, aydaay nu Kay-luo tatelungan nu kakulian. Kay-luo-cen-paw itida i walian nu macimacian. miliwliw tu Kay-luo Yi-se-lan malumanay, Kay-luo nu tipan idaw ku ahebalay a kilakilangan nu dadanan, itidaay a niyadu'an malalid nu O-cuo aydaay a sangan nu luma'an, walian nu pinaay a se-cian kacikian sa nai' ku mamamelawan, adidiay a dada, macacecelay nu matatuntunduhay a luamaan atu Yi-se-lan a sangan nu luma' ku tatungusan. . amisan nu Kay-luo atu sawalian pasu Wi-sin tukay nu niyadu'an, u aydaay nu macunusay a tukay nu niyadu'an, hakiya i 20 se-ci tu hedek atu 21 se-ci lingatu mabuwah tawya, mananam tu Kay-luo a nikacelakan. Ni-luo-he nutipan maala ku Kay-luo macimacian, nika namaka Ci-lun-se atu Ci-lung-sen nikakaputan. aydaay nina tukay amica kaw nu Kay-lauo a niyadu'an u tademaw makaala tu 270 wang nu tademawan. tusepsepwal mihcaan Kay-lou-sen itida i He-le-wang amisan, tawya Ka-luo timulan nu niyadu'an, pasu Ma-ti atu Sin-kay-lu, pakakenisa pala baluhay a sen, katukuh i tusepcaycay mihcaan, He-le-wang-sen malangatu aca papidipicen i Kay-luo-sen. .
